title: The Evolution Theory That You Probably HAVEN'T Heard Of
summary: This video discusses an alternative theory about human evolution, questioning why significant developments like agriculture, religion, and culture emerged only in the last 5% of human existence. It proposes that something may have been guiding human physiological and cultural evolution, possibly involving fungal or extraterrestrial influences.

events.description: Homo sapiens have been physiologically the same for roughly 200,000 years
Humans figured out agriculture, history, religion and culture
Human brain began doubling in size from Homo habilis to Homo sapiens

key_claims.claim: Human brain doubled in size from Homo habilis two million years ago to Homo sapiens two hundred thousand years ago
Agriculture, history, religion and culture all emerged in just the last 5% of human existence (roughly 10,000 years ago)
Something may have been guiding human physiological and cultural evolution behind the scenes, possibly fungal or extraterrestrial in nature
